Title: My characteristic
Explain: LetˇŻs check 15 kinds of ability options before starting\the game.

Title: Power control
Explain: Let's practice the controlling of power gauge\with A,D,F keys

Title: Accurate Shot
Explain: Let's practice shooting with D(Left shot) and\F(Right shot) keys.

Title: Dynamic direct shot
Explain: Practice direct shot with D(Left shot) and\F(Right shot) keys.

Title: Score the goal
Explain: Make more than 1 goal with help of your AI\team members as much as you could within\3 minutes.

Title: Passing play
Explain: Pass the ball to AI team member with\A(Long pass) or S(Short pass).

Title: Wild tackle
Explain: Take the ball with Q(Tackle) from opponents player dribbling.

Title: Iron Wall
Explain: Get the ball away with A, D or F keys at the\defense area.

Title: Keep the victory
Explain: Defense with your AI team members from\opponent AI players within 2 and half minutes.

Title: Be sure to win I
Explain: Your team is leading the game as 2:0.\Win the match with AI team members within 3 minutes.

Title: Be sure to win II
Explain: Your team is leading the game as 3:1.\Win the match with 1 or 2 human players\+ AI team members within 3 minutes.

Title: Keep the victory Ął
Explain: Defense with 1 human player + AI team\members within 2 minutes.

Title: Be sure to win Ą´
Explain: The game score is 1:1. Win the match with\1 human player + AI team members within\2 and half minutes.
